name: standards loop reads pr-corpus pattern when it overlaps with an active standard for cross-citation
command:
mkdir -p pr-corpus standards && printf 'patterns:
  - id: no-eval
    overlaps_standard: owasp-asvs:5.2.4
' > pr-corpus/patterns-index.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/standards/cross-loop-link.sh" --patterns pr-corpus/patterns-index.yaml --emit links 2>out.txt && grep -q 'standard=owasp-asvs:5.2.4' out.txt && grep -q 'pr_corpus_pattern=no-eval' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
